scripts.eas-build-pre-install: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@latest --activate && rm -f pnpm-lock.yaml && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile --lockfile-only --ignore-scripts && npm install expo@~52.0.36 @expo/cli@latest-52 expo-router@~4.0.17 react-native-safe-area-context@4.12.0 react-native-screens@~4.1.0 expo-constants@~18.0.11 expo-linking@~8.0.10 expo-status-bar@~3.0.9 expo-symbols@~1.0.8 expo-system-ui@~6.0.9 expo-blur@~15.0.8 expo-font@~14.0.10 expo-haptics@~15.0.8 expo-image@~3.0.11 expo-location@~19.0.8 @react-native-community/netinfo@11.4.1 @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@2.2.0 react-native-gesture-handler@~2.20.2 react-native-reanimated@~3.16.1 babel-plugin-module-resolver @expo-google-fonts/inter @tanstack/react-query expo-modules-autolinking expo-splash-screen react-native-keyboard-controller expo-build-properties --legacy-peer-deps && npx expo install --fix && npx expo prebuild --platform android --no-install && sed -i '/enableBundleCompression/d' android/app/build.gradle
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
